actionUnits.condition: EventTrigger (MonoBehaviour id: 45104963, guid: d0b148fe25e99eb48b9724523833bab1) on Building42 is configured with eventID 4 (PointerClick) to invoke Residential.showlabel on MonoBehaviour id: 45104959 (script guid: 10a92b1b4549024468ecbc96831def68). MonoBehaviour id 45104959 corresponds exactly to the provided Residential script. On trigger, Start() must have initialized 'label' from Player->child[1] with a TextMeshPro component; expected behavior is updating the label text to GetLabel().Substring(0,20), which for Building42 resolves to the prefix of 'Residential:Tora Apartment'.
